mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lwh_ai_conversation_summary WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lwh_ai_conversation_summary (conversation_id, summary_content, covered_message_id, status) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{summaryContent}, #{coveredMessageId}, #{status})
mapper.delete: UPDATE lwh_ai_conversation_summary SET status = 0 WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
